sources.note: Raised as Mason, May 28, 1892, Dawson Lodge No. 16, Washington DC

notes: Great-grandfather on the Gordon line. Born in Washington DC. Father James H. Gordon died July 13, 1869 when William was 3. Listed as 'Stepson' in 1880 census — mother Mary Jane Arnold remarried. Raised as a Mason on May 28, 1892 at Dawson Lodge No. 16, Washington DC. Married Mary Esther Mayes on January 23, 1895 in DC. One daughter: Myrtelle M. Gordon (1896). Mother Mary Jane Arnold died December 31, 1909. Half-siblings include Matilda C. Nokes, George W. Nokes (1869-1894), William U. Nokes (d. 1923), Ethel Adelaide Nokes (1878-1915), Royce Arnold Nokes (1880-). Full siblings: Nettie Gordon (d. 1870), Katie E. Gordon (1859-1863), Willie Arnold Gordon (1861-1862), Robert B. Gordon (1864-), Mary M. Gordon (1868-). Died June 23, 1926 at age 60. Buried at Congressional Cemetery, Washington DC.
